name: Eezy Oyj
summary: Eezy Oyj operates as a HR services company primarily in Finland. The company offers staff leasing services; personnel and praised training services for corporate clients, and foreign workforce solutions by bringing skilled and qualified employees from abroad to Finland. It also provides recruitment services, such as executive search, personal assessment comprising an aptitude test, and interim management services; and organization development services, which include the development of personnel experience, development of customer experience, outplacement, and employment services for the public administration organizations. The company was formerly known as VMP Oyj and changed its name to Eezy Oyj in December 2019. Eezy Oyj was founded in 1988 and is based in Turku, Finland.
